text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has successfully achieved her goal of
surpassing Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's passed those crucial first three years in the
best possible way.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
How would you describe these last three years in
one word?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If I had to choose one word, I'd say "challenging"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Becoming the best among my peers and going for
the Triple Crown... It was a lot!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But most of all, the reason I ran was to surpass
Prez!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
So then, your most cherished memory would be
the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yeah, I guess so! That was the race that
made my dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Ever since you won the Arima Kinen, your image
really has changed!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
The viewers say you appear more dignified and
mature now. What's your reaction to this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel on top of the world! Mwahaha! Kneel before
my power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Hahahaha!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After everything she's achieved, it seems people
finally see her as grown-up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And yet, the place she takes me to after is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! The amusement park!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which one should we ride first? The roller
coaster? The pirate ship? Of course we'll get
around to them all anyways!
choice_data_list: Nice to see you so excited.
Nice to see you so excited.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, you think I sound like a child, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll have you know, everyone thinks I've grown up
very much!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's a pity you haven't noticed it yet yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But anyways, let's go already! We don't have time
to waste!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All the rides have been conquered! Even the
amusement park was no match for me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
By the way, thanks for coming along with me
today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What can I say but yes?! Big rides really are the best! Especially when they go really fast!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I should also say... thanks. Not just for
today—for everything!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...I'm really happy you're my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
At first, I thought since I'm the one running, any
trainer would do...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But these three years have really shown me that
no one else can do what you do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, really, truly, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah! It's Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow! You know who I am?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're the one who overthrew the Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
When I get bigger, I want to become a racer too!
And then I'll beat you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, is that so? Well, I'll be waiting for ya! I'll see
you on the racetrack one day!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! See you then!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: See you! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel super excited all of a sudden. I'd run a race
right now if I could!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if this is how Prez felt when I told her I
was coming for her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I gotta keep my game face on. That kid is gonna
be my rival one day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No, not just that kid... I'm gonna inspire a ton of
Umamusume!
choice_data_list: You really have done well for yourself.
You really have done well for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! So you've finally realized?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which means we're gonna be ultra busy from here
on out! Let's keep it up!
choice_data_list: I'll be right there with you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins chapter two of the legend of the
great Teio!
